A2121 Current Reconciled Medication List - Provider CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether, at the time of discharge to another provider, the current facility provided the resident’s current reconciled medication list to the subsequent provider. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
853 ROUTE_PRVDR_EHR_CD ROUTE_PRVDR_EHR_CD A2122A Provider Trans - Electronic Health Record CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to
